posts.author: ram_perel (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Guys,
monday Storage is really cool! But it is missing some features -

  1. The ability to increase a value of a key You can fetch and set it but what if someone else got between your legs)
  2. The ability to so smart searches
  3. The ability to fetch easiely the data from the storage (Like an outside API for the Storage)

I’m sure there are more things people here can think of to improve monday Storage so lets put them here

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ram_perel,

Thank you for sending your feedback and request!

Everyone: You can vote for this at the top of the screen!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would add - Ability to listen to database updates.

This would unlock capabilities for real time collaboration
